subject: Start from ts_import
body:
Hi all,

I am starting to use WarpTools and would like to know the following: I have 
a few tilt series stacks already motion corrected. Is it possible to use 
ts_import to upload these? I have tried the command 

WarpTools ts_import \
--mdocs /Warptest/ \
--frameseries warp_frameseries \
--tilt_exposure 2.26324 \
--output tomostar \
--dont_invert

And it spits out the following:

Found 3 MDOC files, searching for *.mdoc in /Warptest/
Looking for frame series...
Unhandled exception. System.Exception: No frame series metadata found at 
/Warptest/warp_frameseries
   at WarpTools.Commands.ImportTiltseries.Run(Object options) in 
/usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1737588682413/work/WarpTools/Commands/Tiltseries/ImportTiltseries.cs:line 
118
   at WarpTools.WarpTools.Run(Object options) in 
/usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1737588682413/work/WarpTools/Program.cs:line 
30
   at Warp.Tools.CommandLineParserHelper.ParseAndRun(String[] args, Func`2 
run, Type[] verbs, String appName) in 
/usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1737588682413/work/WarpLib/Tools/CommandLineParserHelper.cs:line 
26
   at WarpTools.WarpTools.Main(String[] args) in 
/usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1737588682413/work/WarpTools/Program.cs:line 
17
   at WarpTools.WarpTools.<Main>(String[] args)
/script/run_warp: line 16: 47738 Aborted                 WarpTools 
ts_import --mdocs /Warptest/ --frameseries warp_frameseries --tilt_exposure 
2.26324 --output tomostar. 

Which kind of metadata is required?

Thanks,
Luis
